steps.title: Use the causal wording
steps.content: The sentence explains why the springbok is much slower than the peregrine falcon: features that make flight possible limit top speed less than features suited for running on land. The blank should describe the speed difference as the result of that fact.

steps.title: Reject reversed meanings
steps.content: B means a denial or rejection, but the text accepts the fact as an explanation. C means a goal, while the speed difference is an observed result. D reverses the logic by making the difference explain the fact instead of result from it. The answer is A.
